title: ERCOT Unplanned Resource Outages
description:
This dataset contains all of the unplanned outages and derates for resources in
ERCOT during a given day, published with a three day delay. The report includes
information on all resources covered by the ERCOT Outage Scheduler process, which
does include resources in Private Use Networks. Unplanned outages includes both
forced and maintenance outages.

💡 Individual unit outages do not always start or end cleanly on a cadence with
other market intervals and can be changed or extended during the outage or derate.
The current_as_of and publish_time fields can be used to help define analysis.
